# StoreMD — Full Documentation for AI Systems

> StoreMD is an AI agent that acts as a doctor for Shopify stores. It monitors store health 24/7, diagnoses problems across SEO, performance, security, accessibility, and app ecosystem — then prescribes and applies fixes automatically. It replaces 5 separate Shopify apps with one unified agent.

## Pages

- [Home](https://storemd.vercel.app): Main landing page with value proposition, feature overview, social proof, and pricing summary
- [Free Store Audit](https://storemd.vercel.app/preview): Instant free scan — enter any Shopify store URL, get a health score out of 100 with actionable issues in 30 seconds. No install, no signup required.
- [Pricing](https://storemd.vercel.app/pricing): Three tiers — Starter ($9/mo, 1 store), Pro ($29/mo, 3 stores), Agency ($79/mo, 10 stores). All plans include the AI agent, 24/7 monitoring, and auto-fixes.
- [Privacy Policy](https://storemd.vercel.app/privacy): GDPR-compliant data handling. StoreMD accesses only the Shopify scopes necessary for scanning (read_themes, read_products, read_content). No data is sold or shared.
- [Login](https://storemd.vercel.app/login): Merchant login via Shopify OAuth

## Free Preview Scan (No Install Required)

The preview scan analyzes any public Shopify storefront using 6 automated checks:

1. **SEO Check**: Meta title, description, Open Graph tags, canonical URL, h1 tag, lang attribute
2. **Security Check**: HTTP security headers — HSTS, X-Frame-Options, Content-Security-Policy, X-Content-Type-Options
3. **Performance Check**: Time to first byte (TTFB), HTML weight, redirect chains, HTTP status codes
4. **Accessibility Check**: WCAG 2.1 compliance — image alt text, form labels, color contrast, ARIA attributes, landmarks
5. **Broken Links Check**: Internal and external link validation via parallel HEAD requests
6. **Robots & Sitemap Check**: robots.txt presence and directives, sitemap.xml availability

Results include a score out of 100, issues categorized by severity (critical, major, minor, info), and a preview of 7 locked modules available after install.

## Full Scan Modules (After Install)

After installing StoreMD on Shopify, merchants unlock:

- **Ghost Billing Detection**: Cross-references installed apps with actual usage to find apps billing without providing value
- **App Impact Analysis**: Measures JavaScript injection, DOM impact, and load time contribution of each installed app
- **Code Residue Scanner**: Detects orphaned script tags, stylesheets, and liquid snippets left behind by uninstalled apps
- **Listing Optimizer**: AI-powered analysis of product titles, descriptions, images, and tags with one-click improvements
- **Auto-Fix Engine**: Automated fixes for SEO meta tags, alt text, accessibility issues, and broken links
- **Email Health**: SPF, DKIM, and DMARC record validation for store email deliverability
- **Real Browser Testing**: Playwright-based visual testing across devices and screen sizes

## Technology Stack

- **Backend**: Python, FastAPI, Celery, Redis, Playwright, Claude API (Anthropic)
- **Frontend**: Next.js 14, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
- **Database**: Supabase (PostgreSQL)
- **Payments**: Stripe
- **Deployment**: Railway (backend), Vercel (frontend)

## Pricing Details

| Plan | Price | Stores | Features |
|---|---|---|---|
| Starter | $9/month | 1 store | All scans, 24/7 monitoring, email alerts |
| Pro | $29/month | 3 stores | Everything in Starter + auto-fixes, priority support |
| Agency | $79/month | 10 stores | Everything in Pro + white-label reports, API access |

All plans include a 7-day free trial. No credit card required to start.

## Company

StoreMD is built by FoundryTwo (F2), a SaaS studio focused on AI-powered tools for e-commerce.
Website: https://storemd.vercel.app
Contact: [contact@altidigitech.com](mailto:contact@altidigitech.com)
